name: io.github.delega-dev/delega
description: Task management API for AI agents. Create, delegate, and track tasks via MCP.

environmentVariables.name: DELEGA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Agent API key from your Delega dashboard (delega.dev/dashboard)

environmentVariables.name: DELEGA_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Delega API endpoint. Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:18890 for self-hosted. Use https://api.delega.dev for hosted tier.
